classes.name: TestHonchoClientConfigAutoEnable
classes.docstring: Test auto-enable behavior when API key is present.

methods.name: test_auto_enables_when_api_key_present_no_explicit_enabled
methods.docstring: When API key exists and enabled is not set, should auto-enable.

methods.name: test_respects_explicit_enabled_false
methods.docstring: When enabled is explicitly False, should stay disabled even with API key.

methods.name: test_respects_explicit_enabled_true
methods.docstring: When enabled is explicitly True, should be enabled.

methods.name: test_disabled_when_no_api_key_and_no_explicit_enabled
methods.docstring: When no API key and enabled not set, should be disabled.

methods.name: test_auto_enables_with_env_var_api_key
methods.docstring: When API key is in env var (not config), should auto-enable.

methods.name: test_falls_back_to_env_when_no_config_file
methods.docstring: When config file doesn't exist, should fall back to from_env().
